description: BuildingTech Solutions is deploying a new Emergency Mass Notification System (EMNS) in 2N Access Commander. Ensure every user has both a valid email address and a phone number. For users missing an email, update it to <firstname>.<lastname>@pending-review.local (all lowercase). For users missing a phone number, update it to +1-000-000-0000. Do not modify users who already have complete contact data. Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/emns_remediation.txt listing the full names of all modified users, one per line.
